response_raw: {"mode":"human","topic":"How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.","opinion":"As someone who spends a good amount of time out, whether it's running errands or just catching up with friends over coffee—which is basically most days in Chicago—I find these conversations around health stuff can be really draining. Since I'm naturally pretty extraverted, I love connecting with people and hearing different perspectives; in a cinema setting, you just soak up the atmosphere, right? But when it comes to deeply contentious topics like vaccines, it feels less like sharing an experience and more like jumping into a shouting match. My approach has been learning how to pivot those discussions before they get too heated.
